channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: SARS Clamps Down on Influencers: Tracking Perks as Taxable Income
item.description: For years, South African influencers operated in a largely unregulated space, receiving perks like free products and all-expenses-paid trips, which they often didn’t consider as taxable income. Howeve...

item.title: Jammu Youth Dies After Being Misled Into Russian Military Conflict
item.description: A tragic incident occurred involving a 23-year-old man from Jammu, Sachin Khajuria, who was deceived by job offers in Russia and later found to have been killed in the Russia-Ukraine war. In August 20...

item.title: Trump’s Escalating Threats Against Iran and Pakistan’s Role in Mediation
item.description: US President Donald Trump has once again escalated tensions with Iran by reiterating his threats of severe military action. Speaking at a White House news conference, he warned that Iran could be 'tak...

item.title: The Impact of Film Personalities on Tamil Nadu’s Political and Social Landscape
item.description: Jayakanthan’s novella *Cinemavukku Pona Chitthalu* explores the powerful influence of cinema on social identity and political consciousness in Tamil Nadu. Set in Chennai, the story revolves around Kam...

item.title: Iran’s Warnings Against US Tech Firms, Trump’s Election Strategies, and Polymarket’s Failed Pop-up Event
item.description: The latest episode of WIRED’s 'Uncanny Valley' podcast delves into three major topics shaping current global and domestic affairs. The hosts discuss Iran’s recent threats to attack major US technology...

item.title: Johannesburg man drowns in Gonubie River during outing with friends
item.description: On Sunday afternoon, a 30-year-old man from Johannesburg tragically drowned in the Gonubie River in KuGompo City. The incident occurred when he and two friends, all colleagues, were visiting the river...

item.title: Mechanical and Weather Problems Disrupt BC Ferries Service Across Major Routes
item.description: BC Ferries has cancelled multiple sailings on major routes connecting the British Columbia mainland and Vancouver Island due to a combination of mechanical issues and deteriorating weather conditions....

item.title: Bihar BJP set to assume Chief Minister position following Nitish Kumar’s resignation
item.description: On April 6, 2026, Bihar BJP President Sanjay Saraogi gave a clear indication that the Bharatiya Janata Party is poised to occupy the Chief Minister’s position in the state. The announcement came durin...

item.title: Family Questions Cause of Death of Kakamega Polytechnic Principal After Autopsy Findings
item.description: The family of the late Carolyne Khamete, principal of Kakamega County Polytechnic, has dismissed claims that she drowned in Lake Victoria. According to her relatives, especially her father, the post-m...

item.title: Kenya Senate's Oversight: Are They Going Too Far in Controlling Governors?
item.description: Kenya's Senate has increasingly been at odds with county governors over oversight roles, sparking tension as Senate enforcement becomes more dramatic. While the Constitution mandates Senate oversight ...

item.title: Manitoba residents of Iranian descent face anxiety as conflict escalates in Iran
item.description: Thousands of kilometres separate Iranians living in Manitoba from their families back home, yet the ongoing conflict in Iran keeps them constantly worried. Majid Kermani described the strain of limite...

item.title: From Rugby Fields to the Royal Navy: Esteen Andanyi’s New Chapter in Marine Engineering
item.description: Esteen “Mchawi” Andanyi, once known for his speed and leadership on Kenya’s rugby pitches, has begun a new chapter of his life after joining the UK’s Royal Navy. The former winger and fullback has jus...

item.title: ADC raises concerns over INEC refusal to accept party correspondence amid court case
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don accuse the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) say dem dey use administrative measures wey fit stop the party from participating for upcoming ele...

item.title: Current Evidence and Considerations for Medicinal Cannabis Use in Children with Autism, ADHD, or Tourette’s
item.description: In recent years, there has been growing interest in whether medicinal cannabis can assist children with emotional and behavioural challenges associated with conditions such as autism, ADHD, and Touret...

item.title: Savannah Guthrie Returns to 'Today' as the Search for Her Missing Mother Enters Its Third Month
item.description: Savannah Guthrie, cohost of NBC’s ‘Today’ show, made an emotional return to the anchor desk on April 6, 2026, after more than two months away due to her mother Nancy Guthrie’s disappearance. Nancy Gut...

item.title: President Ruto Praises Majembe After Controversial Vurugu Boxing Win, Promises Support for Sport
item.description: President William Ruto has publicly congratulated Portifas Odipo, popularly known as Majembe, for his win over Ferdinand Omondi, known as Mbavu Destroyer, in the recent Vurugu Championship held at Kas...

item.title: Three NCERT Experts Seek Supreme Court Review Over Lifetime Ban for Textbook Content
item.description: Three eminent academicians, Prof Michel Danino, Suparna Diwakar, and Alok Prasanna Kumar, who were engaged as experts by NCERT, have approached the Supreme Court seeking a review of a lifetime ban imp...

item.title: GSIS to Provide P19 Billion in Loan Refunds to Members as Financial Relief
item.description: The Government Service Insurance System (GSIS) has announced that it will release a P19 billion fund for loan refunds to its members. This decision replaces the proposed payment moratorium originally ...

item.title: Father Supports Son’s Dream by Enrolling Him in Aviation Program
item.description: In Nairobi, a father, Kaberia Bariu, is taking early steps to support his seven-year-old son Kyran's ambition of becoming a pilot. Recognising Kyran's fascination with planes and machines from a very ...

item.title: Woman abducted and raped by fake taxi driver shares her harrowing experience
item.description: A woman, referred to as Sophie for anonymity, has bravely shared her traumatic experience after being abducted and raped by a man pretending to be a taxi driver in Glasgow. On 7 August 2022, after bei...
